chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N.D- 1052 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4367/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case. 26.09.2023 Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Shahani, Advocate along with Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI Judge Judge ARBROHI
